translations.item.apple.name: Apple
translations.item.apple.description: A fresh red apple. Restores a small amount of health.
translations.item.brass-key.name: Brass Key
translations.item.brass-key.description: An old brass key. It looks like it might open something nearby.
translations.item.wooden-sword.name: Wooden Sword
translations.item.wooden-sword.description: A simple wooden training sword. Better than nothing.
translations.item.health-potion.name: Health Potion
translations.item.health-potion.description: A glowing red potion that restores health.
translations.item.old-map.name: Old Map
translations.item.old-map.description: A weathered map showing the local area. Some locations are marked with an X.
